famous quote:
LIfe is 10% what happens to me and 90% how I react to it. 
-John Maxwell
Interview Text:
Trevor:

(part 2)

I don't always get it right, but Im growing. The only way to know if you have heard from God is to step out and expect to see fruit happen. 

Sometimes God speaks to me through words of Knowledge for physical healing. This is how it happens. I actually feel pain that isn't mine in a certain part of my body and that's how I know God wants me to heal someone who has that pain. It only lasts for a few seconds, but when it happens I know I should go and find that person. I have seen this happen multiple times and God has healed the person that I find right there on the spot.
Music Video Instructions: When God seems silent, sing this to him. But then think of him singing it to you, waiting for you to respond to him.
